name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana
benefit_description: Health insurance cover of ₹5,00,000 per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation
hindi_name: आयुष्मान भारत - पीएम जन आरोग्य योजना
tamil_name: ஆயுஷ்மான் பாரத் - பிஎம் ஜன் ஆரோக்கிய திட்டம்
description: World's largest government-funded health insurance program covering over 10 crore poor families.

name: e-Shram Card Registration
benefit_description: Accidental insurance of ₹2,00,000 + access to social security schemes for unorganised workers
description: National database for unorganised workers providing them identity and social security benefits.

name: PM Shram Yogi Mandhan Yojana
benefit_description: Monthly pension of ₹3,000 after age 60 for unorganised sector workers
tamil_name: பிரதம மந்திரி ஷ்ரம் யோகி மான்தன் திட்டம்
description: Voluntary pension scheme for unorganised workers ensuring old age security with monthly pension.

name: PM Awas Yojana - Gramin
benefit_description: Financial assistance of ₹1,20,000 for construction of pucca house in plain areas
description: Housing for all scheme providing financial assistance to rural poor for constructing pucca houses.

name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi
benefit_description: Income support of ₹6,000 per year paid in 3 instalments of ₹2,000 directly to farmers
description: Income support scheme for small and marginal farmers across India with direct bank transfer.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
benefit_description: Free LPG connection with ₹1,600 assistance for BPL households
description: Free LPG connections to women from BPL households for clean cooking fuel.

name: Mahatma Gandhi NREGA
benefit_description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per year at minimum wage (₹202-330/day)
hindi_name: महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी अधिनियम
tamil_name: மகாத்மா காந்தி தேசிய கிராமப்புற வேலைவாய்ப்பு உத்தரவாத திட்டம்
description: Employment guarantee scheme providing 100 days of work to rural households.
